acceptanceCriteria: A synchronous node-pty require/spawn failure such as "posix_spawnp failed" must not crash Vitest before live-stack artifacts are written.
The non-TTY interactive live-stack path must fall back to a controlled execution mode, preferably bridged interactive, while keeping command transcripts and scenario artifacts intact.
The fix must preserve the existing node-pty path when PTY startup succeeds.
The fix must cover Codex and Claude live-stack interactive BP/predefined lanes without requiring real macOS ARM64 hardware in unit tests.
Verification must include targeted regression tests and broader live-stack/agent-mux checks.
nonGoals: Do not remove interactive live-stack coverage.
Do not make CI native addon rebuilds the only fix.
Do not require live provider credentials for regression coverage.
Do not refactor unrelated agent-mux CLI behavior.
